_comment_install: 21st.dev Magic MCP — UI-component generator MCP server.
Lets the agent generate polished React components on demand via /ui prompts.
1. Sign up at https://21st.dev/magic and grab your API key
(b) Export TWENTY_FIRST_API_KEY in your shell and remove the env block here
Once active, this agent gains the @magic-mcp tool surface. Triggers on /ui prompts.
Remove this _comment_install block once the API key is set so the JSON parses cleanly without commentary.

magic._note: Set disabled to false after adding the API key above.
